name: Deploy ivxholding.com landing page

# On push to main (or manual dispatch) this builds + uploads the landing page
# to the S3 bucket and invalidates CloudFront, using GitHub repository secrets.
#
# Required GitHub repository secrets:
#   AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
#   AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
#   AWS_REGION                       (e.g. us-east-1)
#   S3_BUCKET_NAME                   (informational; deploy script targets ivxholding.com)
#   EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
#   EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
# Optional:
#   CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID       (auto-discovered if omitted)
#   EXPO_PUBLIC_IVX_API_BASE_URL / EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
#
# NOTE: deploy/deploy-landing.mjs lives in expo/ and reads files relative to that
# folder, so every step runs with working-directory: expo.

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - 'expo/ivxholding-landing/**'
      - 'expo/deploy-landing.mjs'
      - 'expo/scripts/landing-*.mjs'
      - 'expo/assets/images/**'
      - '.github/workflows/deploy-landing.yml'
  workflow_dispatch: {}

concurrency:
  group: deploy-landing-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  deploy-landing:
    name: Build + upload landing to S3 + invalidate CloudFront
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
        working-directory: expo
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Install AWS SDK deploy dependencies
        run: bun add @aws-sdk/client-s3 @aws-sdk/client-cloudfront

      - name: Deploy landing page (build + upload + CloudFront invalidation)
        env:
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}
          S3_BUCKET_NAME: ${{ secrets.S3_BUCKET_NAME }}
          CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID }}
          EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL }}
          EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY }}
          EXPO_PUBLIC_IVX_API_BASE_URL: ${{ secrets.EXPO_PUBLIC_IVX_API_BASE_URL }}
          EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL: ${{ secrets.EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL }}
        run: bun deploy-landing.mjs

      - name: Verify live URLs (content + content-types)
        run: |
          set -uo pipefail
          BASE="https://ivxholding.com"
          FAIL=0

          check() {
            local path="$1" expect_ct="$2"
            local url="${BASE}${path}"
            local code ct
            code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 30 "$url" || echo "000")
            ct=$(curl -sI --max-time 30 "$url" | tr -d '\r' | awk -F': ' 'tolower($1)=="content-type"{print tolower($2)}')
            echo "GET ${url} -> HTTP ${code} (content-type: ${ct:-none})"
            if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then
              echo "::error::${url} returned HTTP ${code} (expected 200)"
              FAIL=1
            fi
            if [ -n "$expect_ct" ] && [[ "$ct" != *"$expect_ct"* ]]; then
              echo "::error::${url} content-type '${ct}' does not contain '${expect_ct}'"
              FAIL=1
            fi
          }

          check "/"             "text/html"
          check "/capture"      "text/html"
          check "/capture.html" "text/html"
          check "/robots.txt"   "text/plain"
          check "/sitemap.xml"  "xml"

          if [ "$FAIL" -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Live URL verification failed"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "All live URLs verified."

name: Deploy IVX Holdings API (legacy ECS - manual only)

# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH FOR PRODUCTION AUTO-DEPLOY = Render (render.yaml,
# autoDeployTrigger: commit). Production api.ivxholding.com is served by Render
# (verified: response header `x-render-origin-server: Render`), which redeploys
# automatically on EVERY push to main with no manual or owner action.
#
# This legacy AWS ECS pipeline does NOT serve the live domain. It previously ran
# on every push and produced failing/irrelevant deploy runs that looked like a
# blocked pipeline. It is now manual-only (workflow_dispatch) so it can never
# compete with or mask Render auto-deploy. Do not re-enable the push trigger.
on:
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  APP_NAME: ivx-holdings
  AWS_REGION: us-east-1
  ECS_CLUSTER: ivx-holdings-cluster
  ECS_SERVICE: ivx-holdings-api-service
  CONTAINER_NAME: ivx-holdings-api
  API_URL: https://api.ivxholding.com

jobs:
  validate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest
      - name: Install backend dependencies
        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Type check backend
        run: bunx tsc --noEmit

  build-and-deploy:
    name: Deploy API to ECS
    needs: validate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          aws-region: ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Login to Amazon ECR
        id: login-ecr
        uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@v2

      - name: Set image tag
        id: tag
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          SHORT_SHA=$(echo "${{ github.sha }}" | cut -c1-7)
          TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
          echo "IMAGE_TAG=${SHORT_SHA}-${TIMESTAMP}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "ECR_URI=${{ steps.login-ecr.outputs.registry }}/${APP_NAME}-api" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build Docker image
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          docker build \
            --no-cache \
            --pull \
            --platform linux/amd64 \
            -t "${{ steps.tag.outputs.ECR_URI }}:${{ steps.tag.outputs.IMAGE_TAG }}" \
            -t "${{ steps.tag.outputs.ECR_URI }}:latest" \
            .

      - name: Push Docker image
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          docker push "${{ steps.tag.outputs.ECR_URI }}:${{ steps.tag.outputs.IMAGE_TAG }}"
          docker push "${{ steps.tag.outputs.ECR_URI }}:latest"

      - name: Register task definition revision
        id: task-def
        env:
          ECR_URI: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.ECR_URI }}
          IMAGE_TAG: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.IMAGE_TAG }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          CURRENT=$(aws ecs describe-task-definition \
            --task-definition "${APP_NAME}-api" \
            --query 'taskDefinition' \
            --output json)
          NEW_DEF=$(CURRENT_TASK_DEF="$CURRENT" python3 .github/scripts/render-ecs-task-def.py)
          TASK_ARN=$(aws ecs register-task-definition \
            --cli-input-json "$NEW_DEF" \
            --query 'taskDefinition.taskDefinitionArn' \
            --output text)
          echo "TASK_ARN=$TASK_ARN" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Deploy to ECS
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          aws ecs update-service \
            --cluster "$ECS_CLUSTER" \
            --service "$ECS_SERVICE" \
            --task-definition "${{ steps.task-def.outputs.TASK_ARN }}" \
            --force-new-deployment \
            --output text > /dev/null

      - name: Wait for ECS stability
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          aws ecs wait services-stable \
            --cluster "$ECS_CLUSTER" \
            --services "$ECS_SERVICE"

      - name: Health check
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          RETRIES=0
          until [ "$RETRIES" -ge 12 ]; do
            BODY=$(curl -sf --max-time 15 "$API_URL/health" || true)
            STATUS=$(HEALTH_BODY="$BODY" python3 .github/scripts/parse-health.py)
            if [ "$STATUS" = "healthy" ]; then
              echo "Health check passed"
              printf '%s\n' "$BODY"
              exit 0
            fi
            RETRIES=$((RETRIES + 1))
            echo "Retry $RETRIES/12 waiting for healthy backend"
            sleep 10
          done
          echo "Backend health check failed"
          exit 1

name: Render Deploy Trigger

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      clear_cache:
        description: 'Clear build cache'
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean

jobs:
  trigger-render-deploy:
    name: Trigger Render Deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Check RENDER_API_KEY
        id: check-key
        run: |
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" ]; then
            echo "RENDER_API_KEY secret is NOT configured in this GitHub repo."
            echo "status=missing_key" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "RENDER_API_KEY secret is configured."
            echo "status=key_found" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}" ]; then
            echo "RENDER_SERVICE_ID secret is NOT configured."
            echo "service_id_missing=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "RENDER_SERVICE_ID secret is configured."
            echo "service_id_missing=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Trigger Render Deploy
        if: steps.check-key.outputs.status == 'key_found' && steps.check-key.outputs.service_id_missing == 'false'
        id: deploy
        run: |
          SERVICE_ID="${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}"
          CLEAR_CACHE="${{ github.event.inputs.clear_cache == 'true' && 'clear' || 'do_not_clear' }}"
          
          echo "Triggering Render deploy for service: ${SERVICE_ID}"
          echo "Clear cache: ${CLEAR_CACHE}"
          
          RESPONSE=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 30 \
            -X POST "https://api.render.com/v1/services/${SERVICE_ID}/deploys" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "Accept: application/json" \
            -d "{\"clearCache\": \"${CLEAR_CACHE}\"}")
          
          echo "Render API response:"
          echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "$RESPONSE"
          
          DEPLOY_ID=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('deploy',{}).get('id','') or d.get('id',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
          DEPLOY_STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('deploy',{}).get('status','') or d.get('status',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
          
          echo "deploy_id=${DEPLOY_ID}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "deploy_status=${DEPLOY_STATUS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
          if [ -n "${DEPLOY_ID}" ]; then
            echo "Deploy triggered: ${DEPLOY_ID} (${DEPLOY_STATUS})"
          else
            echo "::warning::Could not parse deploy ID from response"
          fi

      - name: Wait for Deploy
        if: steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id != ''
        run: |
          DEPLOY_ID="${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id }}"
          SERVICE_ID="${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}"
          MAX_WAIT=480
          WAITED=0
          
          echo "Waiting for deploy ${DEPLOY_ID} to complete..."
          while [ $WAITED -lt $MAX_WAIT ]; do
            RESPONSE=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 15 \
              "https://api.render.com/v1/services/${SERVICE_ID}/deploys/${DEPLOY_ID}" \
              -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" \
              -H "Accept: application/json")
            
            STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('status',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
            COMMIT=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print((d.get('commit',{}) or {}).get('id','')[:8])" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
            
            echo "[${WAITED}s] Deploy status: ${STATUS} | commit: ${COMMIT}"
            
            case "${STATUS}" in
              live)
                echo "Deploy is LIVE!"
                echo "deploy_commit=${COMMIT}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                exit 0
                ;;
              build_failed|update_failed|canceled|deactivated)
                echo "Deploy failed with status: ${STATUS}"
                exit 1
                ;;
            esac
            
            sleep 15
            WAITED=$((WAITED + 15))
          done
          
          echo "Timeout waiting for deploy to complete (${MAX_WAIT}s)"
          exit 1

      - name: Verify Production Health
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Checking production health..."
          for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
            HEALTH=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 15 https://api.ivxholding.com/health 2>/dev/null || echo '{"status":"unreachable"}')
            STATUS=$(echo "$HEALTH" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('status','?'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
            COMMIT=$(echo "$HEALTH" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('commitShort','?'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
            echo "Health check $i: status=${STATUS} commit=${COMMIT}"
            if [ "$STATUS" = "healthy" ]; then
              echo "Production is healthy at commit ${COMMIT}"
              break
            fi
            sleep 10
          done

      - name: Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Render Deploy Trigger Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Deploy ID**: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id || 'N/A' }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Initial Status**: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_status || 'N/A' }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **GitHub SHA**: ${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Triggered at**: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

name: Render Auto-Deploy on Push

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      clear_cache:
        description: 'Clear build cache'
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Render
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    steps:
      - name: Validate secrets
        id: secrets
        run: |
          MISSING=""
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" ]; then
            echo "MISSING_SECRET: RENDER_API_KEY"
            MISSING="${MISSING} RENDER_API_KEY"
          fi
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}" ]; then
            echo "MISSING_SECRET: RENDER_SERVICE_ID"
            MISSING="${MISSING} RENDER_SERVICE_ID"
          fi
          if [ -n "${MISSING}" ]; then
            echo "status=blocked" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "missing=${MISSING}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "::error::Missing secrets:${MISSING}"
          else
            echo "status=ready" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Trigger Render Deploy
        if: steps.secrets.outputs.status == 'ready'
        id: deploy
        run: |
          SERVICE_ID="${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}"
          CLEAR_CACHE="${{ github.event.inputs.clear_cache == 'true' && 'clear' || 'do_not_clear' }}"

          echo "Triggering Render deploy for service: ${SERVICE_ID}"
          echo "GitHub SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"

          RESPONSE=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 30 \
            -X POST "https://api.render.com/v1/services/${SERVICE_ID}/deploys" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "Accept: application/json" \
            -d "{\"clearCache\": \"${CLEAR_CACHE}\"}")

          echo "Render API response:"
          echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "$RESPONSE"

          DEPLOY_ID=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
          import sys,json
          d = json.load(sys.stdin)
          deploy = d.get('deploy', d)
          print(deploy.get('id', ''))
          " 2>/dev/null || echo "")

          DEPLOY_STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
          import sys,json
          d = json.load(sys.stdin)
          deploy = d.get('deploy', d)
          print(deploy.get('status', ''))
          " 2>/dev/null || echo "")

          echo "deploy_id=${DEPLOY_ID}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "deploy_status=${DEPLOY_STATUS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          if [ -n "${DEPLOY_ID}" ]; then
            echo "Deploy triggered: ${DEPLOY_ID} (${DEPLOY_STATUS})"
          else
            echo "::error::Could not parse deploy ID from Render response"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Wait for Deploy
        if: steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id != ''
        id: wait
        run: |
          DEPLOY_ID="${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id }}"
          SERVICE_ID="${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}"
          MAX_WAIT=600
          WAITED=0
          INTERVAL=10

          echo "Waiting for deploy ${DEPLOY_ID} to complete..."
          while [ $WAITED -lt $MAX_WAIT ]; do
            RESPONSE=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 15 \
              "https://api.render.com/v1/services/${SERVICE_ID}/deploys/${DEPLOY_ID}" \
              -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" \
              -H "Accept: application/json")

            STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            d = json.load(sys.stdin)
            print(d.get('status', ''))
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")

            COMMIT_SHA=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            d = json.load(sys.stdin)
            commit = d.get('commit', {}) or {}
            sha = commit.get('id', '') if isinstance(commit, dict) else ''
            print(sha[:8] if sha else '?')
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "?")

            echo "[${WAITED}s] Status: ${STATUS} | Commit: ${COMMIT_SHA}"

            case "${STATUS}" in
              live)
                echo "Deploy is LIVE at commit ${COMMIT_SHA}!"
                echo "deploy_commit=${COMMIT_SHA}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                echo "deploy_final_status=live" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                exit 0
                ;;
              build_failed|update_failed|canceled|deactivated)
                echo "::error::Deploy failed: ${STATUS}"
                echo "deploy_final_status=${STATUS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                exit 1
                ;;
            esac

            sleep $INTERVAL
            WAITED=$((WAITED + INTERVAL))
          done

          echo "::error::Timeout waiting for deploy (${MAX_WAIT}s)"
          echo "deploy_final_status=timeout" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          exit 1

      - name: Verify Production Health
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Checking production health..."
          GITHUB_SHA_SHORT=$(echo "${{ github.sha }}" | cut -c1-8)

          for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
            HEALTH=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 15 \
              https://api.ivxholding.com/health 2>/dev/null || echo '{"status":"unreachable"}')

            STATUS=$(echo "$HEALTH" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('status','?'))
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "?")

            COMMIT=$(echo "$HEALTH" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('commitShort','?'))
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "?")

            echo "Health check $i: status=${STATUS} commit=${COMMIT}"

            if [ "$STATUS" = "healthy" ]; then
              if [ "$COMMIT" = "${GITHUB_SHA_SHORT}" ]; then
                echo "COMMIT_MATCH: YES — production commit ${COMMIT} matches GitHub ${GITHUB_SHA_SHORT}"
              else
                echo "COMMIT_MATCH: NO — production=${COMMIT} github=${GITHUB_SHA_SHORT}"
              fi
              break
            fi
            sleep 10
          done

      - name: Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          {
            echo "## Render Auto-Deploy Summary"
            echo ""
            echo "| Field | Value |"
            echo "|-------|-------|"
            echo "| GitHub SHA | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Deploy ID | \`${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id || 'N/A' }}\` |"
            echo "| Deploy Status | \`${{ steps.wait.outputs.deploy_final_status || steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_status || 'N/A' }}\` |"
            echo "| Deployed Commit | \`${{ steps.wait.outputs.deploy_commit || 'N/A' }}\` |"
            echo "| Trigger | \`${{ github.event_name }}\` |"
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
